test.name: Login Onnistuu

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\Mikae\\OneDrive\\Tiedostot\\Front-end\\hyte-projekti\\browser\\traces\\temp\\2e01f470-5e99-44b9-abff-5469280d7d3e"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173/login.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'mikael' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Fills the text 'salasana123' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

test.doc: Testaa, että käyttäjä pystyy kirjautumaan onnistuneesti
